<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Cluster; use Predis\Cluster\Hash\CRC16; use Predis\Cluster\Hash\HashGeneratorInterface; use Predis\NotSupportedException; /** * Default class used by Predis to calculate hashes out of keys of * commands supported by redis-cluster. */ class RedisStrategy extends ClusterStrategy { protected $hashGenerator; /** * @param HashGeneratorInterface|null $hashGenerator Hash generator instance. */ public function __construct(?HashGeneratorInterface $hashGenerator = null) { parent::__construct(); $this->hashGenerator = $hashGenerator ?: new CRC16(); } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function getSlotByKey($key) { $key = $this->extractKeyTag($key); return $this->hashGenerator->hash($key) & 0x3FFF; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function getDistributor() { $class = get_class($this); throw new NotSupportedException("$class does not provide an external distributor"); } }
